c1.descriptionRaw: <color=#FFD780FF>Gyoei Narukami Kariyama Rite</color>'s AoE is increased by 50%.
c1.name: To Cloister Compassion

c2.descriptionRaw: <color=#FFD780FF>Grass Ring of Sanctification</color>'s duration is increased by 3s.
c2.name: To Forsake Fortune

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Sanctifying Ring</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: To Sequester Sorrow

c4.descriptionRaw:
When the Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks of the character affected by Shinobu's <color=#FFD780FF>Grass Ring of Sanctification</color> hit opponents, a Thundergrass Mark will land on the opponent's position and deal <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> based on 9.7% of Shinobu's Max HP.
This effect can occur once every 5s.
c4.name: To Sever Sealing

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Gyoei Narukami Kariyama Rite</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: To Cease Courtesies

c6.descriptionRaw:
When Kuki Shinobu takes lethal DMG, this instance of DMG will not take her down. This effect will automatically trigger when her HP reaches 1 and will trigger once every 60s.
When Shinobu's HP drops below 25%, she will gain 150 Elemental Mastery for 15s. This effect will trigger once every 60s.
c6.name: To Ward Weakness

profile.description: The capable and reliable Arataki Gang deputy leader - Please note: capable and reliable are not appellations for the "Arataki Gang," but for their deputy leader in specific.
profile.name: Kuki Shinobu
profile.title: Mender of Tribulations

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 4 rapid strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Shinobu's Shadowsword

labels: Grass Ring of Sanctification Healing|{param2:F1P} Max HP+{param3:I}

combat2.descriptionRaw: Creates a Grass Ring of Sanctification at the cost of part of her HP, dealing Electro DMG to nearby opponents. Grass Ring of Sanctification Follows your current active character around. Deals Electro DMG to nearby opponents every 1.5s and restores HP for active character(s) within the ring's AoE based on Kuki Shinobu's Max HP. The HP consumption from using this skill can only bring her to 20% HP. "Band the Naku Weed into a loop around your waist, and it shall exorcise evil."
combat2.name: Sanctifying Ring

combat3.descriptionRaw: Stabs an evil-excoriating blade into the ground, creating a field that cleanses the area of all that is foul, dealing continuous Electro DMG to opponents within its AoE based on Shinobu's Max HP. If Shinobu's HP is less than or equal to 50% when this skill is used, the field will last longer. This was originally a technique used in weeding and in ritual prayers for the yearly harvest, but Shinobu has not forgotten it, though her career as a shrine maiden may have ended.
combat3.name: Gyoei Narukami Kariyama Rite

passive1.descriptionRaw: When Shinobu's HP is not higher than 50%, her Healing Bonus is increased by 15%.
passive1.name: Breaking Free

passive2.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Sanctifying Ring</color>'s abilities will be boosted based on Shinobu's Elemental Mastery:
·Healing amount will be increased by 75% of Elemental Mastery.
·DMG dealt is increased by 25% of Elemental Mastery.
passive2.name: Heart's Repose

passive3.descriptionRaw: Gains 25% more rewards when dispatched on an Inazuma Expedition for 20 hours.
passive3.name: Protracted Prayers
